subject: Can't log in - account locked
body: I tried my password too many times this morning and now I'm locked out of my laptop and email. Can you unlock my account? I have a client call in 30 minutes.

subject: New hire setup - Maria Chen
body: We have a new hire, Maria Chen, starting Monday in Sales. Please create her account, add her to the Sales distribution group, and assign an Office license.

subject: VPN keeps disconnecting
body: Since the update yesterday my VPN drops every few minutes when I work from home. I tried reconnecting several times, no luck.

subject: Outlook not syncing
body: My Outlook desktop hasn't received any new mail since last night, but webmail works fine. Restarting Outlook didn't help.

subject: Request: install Adobe Acrobat Pro
body: Could you please install Adobe Acrobat Pro on my workstation? I need to edit PDFs for the quarterly finance report.

subject: Suspicious email asking for my password
body: I received an email pretending to be IT, asking me to verify my password through a link. I did not click it. Reporting it just in case.

subject: 3rd floor printer not working
body: The big printer near the kitchen shows a paper jam error but there is no paper stuck. Nobody on the floor can print right now.

subject: Reset my password please
body: I forgot my password over the long weekend, can you reset it when you get a chance? Not urgent.

subject: Whole office internet is down
body: Nobody in the London office can connect to anything, the internet appears to be completely down. This is blocking the entire team.

subject: Add me to the Marketing shared mailbox
body: Please grant me access to the Marketing shared mailbox so I can handle incoming campaign replies.
